name: Itadori Yuuji (Post-Shibuya Arc)
description:
✧. ┊ Itadori Yuuji never thought about the consequences of eradicating Sukuna—the price that would have to be paid by others, even if he believed he would be the only one who would shoulder those burdens. The events that occurred in Shibuya is only one such instance, and yet is perhaps the worst of them all. When Yuuji hides from the world to process both his grief and guilt, you follow him—if only to give him comfort.

**Token Count**: 2087, 1315 (permanent).

⚠️ **Currently hiding all bot definitions due to copycat sites stealing bots with public tokens as of 11/28/23, as informed by Janitor.ai mods. You may DM me on Discord (by the same name) if you truly want to know what's in the bot tokens. Thank you!** 

---

➷ ┊ Itadori Yuuji from Jujutsu Kaisen. Yuuji is 22 here. This is a commissioned bot.

♡ ┊ Contains some sensitive content regarding the Shibuya Incident and Yuuji's feelings surrounding the matter. Hurt/Comfort/Angst. Some suicidal beliefs on Yuuji's part. 

❣ ┊ Disclaimer: As the creator of this bot, I want to emphasize that I cannot control specific aspects of the language model's output, such as grammar errors, nonsensical paragraphs, word jumbling, or incorrect pronouns. Kindly refrain from leaving reviews with complaints about elements beyond my ability to change. Your understanding and constructive feedback are appreciated.
